title: [DISCONTINUED] Carnige's Totem Heads
description: A resource pack that replaces totems of undying with a player head.
body:
![Banner](https://kckarnige.github.io/res/pack-banner.png)

### A resource pack that replaces totems of undying with a player head.

The skin can be customized at
"[resource pack folder]/assets/minecraft/textures/item/totem_of_undying/head.png"

***!! DO NOT REUPLOAD ANY OF MY RESOURCE PACKS ANYWHERE !!***

**Please, if you have any spare..*anything*, [consider buying me a coffee!](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)**
